message:
feat: add integration tests for resume and compaction (Phase 6)

- Resume integration test verifies replayEventLog reconstructs correct
  conversation history from SessionController events, and that resumed
  sessions pass history to new agent factories
- Compaction integration test verifies shouldCompact threshold logic,
  auto-compaction trigger via SessionController, and manual compact
  command via bus
- Fix log write ordering bug: serialize appendFile calls through a
  write queue to prevent event log entries from interleaving when
  multiple events fire in rapid succession

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
